productDisplayName: Enroute Men Leather Black Formal Shoes
description: Indulge in the luxury of pure leather with this pair of shoes from enroute. In a classic silhouette and with ample cushioning, this oxford makes for a fabulous addition to your wardrobe. This pair comes with a shoe bag and plastic tongue. Upper Full grain leather upper with supple leather inner lining for comfort Lace-up system for a snug, customised Fit Padded footbed for all-day comfort Midsole PU midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protection Outsole Durable rubber outsole with TPR on the forefoot and heel Forefoot unit has grooved wave-styled lugs and pyramidic lugs, with a textured heel unit for absolute grip and traction Raised heel for ergonomic comfort and style Shoe care Wipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner Do not store in direct sunlight
